patterns.description: 68 L5 @F nodes currently have ZERO edges. Apply same approx_expr machinery as phase48 (agent28) to the remaining 68 (mostly L5-bio, but also L5-graphene/YBCO/tc99m/perovskite/nacl/mitochondria/lion/krebs/ice/honeycomb/glycolysis/diamond/cortical).
patterns.source_rule: for each isolated L5-* node with numeric value v, emit edge {from: closest(v) in {n,sigma,phi,tau,sopfr,J2,M3}, to: L5-*, kind: @S, label: approx_expr, source: L5-bridge-fill-2026-04-14}

patterns.description: All 33 existing L5 nodes are deg=1. Add a second canonical path: for each L5-* with bridge to phi, add fallback approx via (phi*tau) or (phi+n) to raise deg=2.
patterns.source_rule: for each L5-* with deg=1, find second-best n6 expr within 1% numeric tolerance; emit @S approx_expr edge with expr like 'phi*tau' or 'n+phi'.

patterns.description: Bio-domain clustering: L5-bio-tcell-subtypes and L5-bio-mhc-classes both value=6 (== equivalence). Chain them via '==' edges to form bio sub-hub.
patterns.source_rule: group L5-bio by value bucket; within bucket, emit '==' equivalence edges (complete graph).

patterns.description: L5-bio-* ↔ L6-biology/medicine cross-linkage via matching concept domain.
patterns.source_rule: string-match L5-bio-glycolysis-steps → L6-biology-*; emit @R Derives edge.

patterns.description: sopfr-path is severely underrepresented (2/33). Add sopfr(v) path for every L5 where sopfr decomposition is exact.
patterns.source_rule: for each L5-* with value v, compute sopfr(v); if sopfr_expr matches n6-* existing node, emit @S.

L6_bridge_candidates.strategy: sub-domain hub instantiation + canonical fill + eco/geo/met/lin cross

patterns.description: 128 mus + 128 geo + 128 eco + 126 met + 126 lin sub-clusters all connect only via n/tau/phi. Instantiate per-subdomain hub nodes (L6-mus-hub, L6-geo-hub, L6-eco-hub, L6-met-hub, L6-lin-hub) as intermediate layer.
patterns.source_rule: create 5 new hub @H nodes {L6-<sd>-hub}; link each L6-<sd>-* to L6-<sd>-hub (1 edge each); link each L6-<sd>-hub to top-3 n6 primitives (phi/n/tau). Net: 5 new hubs, 641 edges.

patterns.description: 344 L6 @F nodes have ZERO edges (no refs in deg sidecar). Apply phase48 approx_expr fill to all.
patterns.source_rule: same as L5_P1 but L6 scope.

patterns.description: 395 L6 nodes at deg=1. Add secondary canonical path.
patterns.source_rule: same as L5_P2 but L6 scope.

patterns.description: Cross-subdomain '==' edges where numeric values match (e.g., L6-eco-xxx = L6-geo-yyy = 6.0 → equivalence cluster).
patterns.source_rule: bucket L6 by value ±1%; emit '==' edges within bucket.

safe_execution_phases.note: identical content (atlas already matched deg, but mtime refreshed — .stats-vs-.deg skew documented in audit A3 was a stale audit-snapshot artifact).

safe_execution_phases.description: generate candidate edges to /tmp/*.jsonl, no atlas write
safe_execution_phases.validation: each candidate passes _guarded_append_atlas() schema check in dry mode

safe_execution_phases.description: append 1600 L6 bridge edges + 5 hub nodes
d0<->d1, d1<->d2 derivation chains inside blowup-d* (20,000 edges)
safe_execution_phases.warning: largest delta — requires staged batches + incremental health checks

safe_execution_phases.description: == edges between matching numeric values across domains (5,000)
degree-1 blowup-* nodes → source primitive back-edges (2060)

L0_considerations: atlas.n6 is L0 — all writes MUST go through _guarded_append_atlas() in shared/blowup/lib/atlas_guard.hexa.inc
user approval required per L0 protocol for each write phase (P2-P6)
schema guard must validate edge format: type+kind+from+to+label+source+timestamp
sidecar writes (.deg, .stats) are NOT L0 — auto-safe
integrity_validation_steps: stage write to /tmp/atlas_patch.n6 — validate line-by-line with _guarded_append_atlas()
dry-run: wc -l check equals planned delta
atomic append: cat /tmp/atlas_patch.n6 >> shared/n6/atlas.n6 (OR via hexa atlas writer)
post-write: hexa shared/n6/atlas_health.hexa — real orphans must stay at current level, no dups, no malformed
post-write: hexa shared/n6/verify_formulas.hexa — formula errors must not increase
risk_assessment.rollback_plan: git diff HEAD -- shared/n6/atlas.n6 | head — always commit after each phase for easy revert
risk_assessment.concurrent_write_risk: atlas.n6.lock advisory; ensure no other session holds lock (currently 0-byte lock at 2026-04-14T00:01 — stale, needs clear before write)

immediate_safe_steps: approve or amend P2-P6 phases individually
blocked_until_approved: P1_dry_run_proposals (generates candidates only, technically safe — but produces discovery output)
next_action.suggested_approval_sequence: P1 → P2 → P3 → P6 → P5 → P4 (smallest-to-largest delta)

A2_A4_A5_mapping.A4_l5_100pct_sparse: addressed by P2 — L5 leaf% 100 → 0, avg_deg 1.0 → 13.1
A2_A4_A5_mapping.A5_l6_growth_isolated: addressed by P3 — L6 leaf% 78.5 → 10, avg_deg 1.3 → 3.8
